narrative:
Precinct Laurel Cliff (precinct in Meigs County) has 403 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.8 percentage points.
